tradable_signals.rationale: Expansion phase is historically strongest for broad equities.
Small caps outperform materially in early-to-mid expansion.
Industrial output and capex expand with the cycle.
Growth and inflation pressure hurt long-duration bonds.
Utilities and defensives lag in risk-on expansion.
